subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for the follow-up. I’d be glad to set up a 30-minute introductory call. I’m available on 2026-04-21, 2026-04-22, and 2026-04-23, each between 14:00 and 16:00 UTC. Please send over the slot that works best for you.

I can’t provide direct contact details for our CTO or VP of Engineering. If you need public company contact information, please refer to our website.

Best,
[Your Name]
